is_p_falciparum.evidence: Study investigates Plasmodium falciparum chloroquine resistance markers in children with uncomplicated malaria.

reports_target_markers.evidence: Reports Pfcrt codon 76 (K76T) and Pfmdr1 codon 86 (N86Y), both curated target positions.

reports_extractable_frequencies.evidence: Table 1 gives allele percentages per site; text gives numerator/denominator, e.g. 'Pfcrt T76... 80% (104/130) at Hohoe, 46% (48/105) at Navrongo, 98% (41/42) at Tarkwa, 61% (38/62) at Sunyani and 46% (31/67) at Yendi.'

sub_country_location.evidence: Frequencies reported per sentinel site with coordinates: Hohoe, Navrongo, Tarkwa, Sunyani, Yendi in Ghana.

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: The paper (published 2006) gives no explicit sample collection year or window anywhere in the text; no usable collection time is stated.

african_field_samples.evidence: Human field/clinical isolates from children with uncomplicated malaria collected at five sentinel sites in Ghana.

is_primary_study.evidence: Primary empirical PCR/RFLP study of 406 recruited patients.

duplicate_risk.evidence: Sentinel-site surveillance for the National Malaria Control Program, but described as a new field collection specific to this study; no explicit statement of overlap with a larger published dataset.

supplement.evidence: All per-locus frequencies are in the main text and Table 1; no supplementary material referenced.

assessment.summary: Primary study of 406 Ghanaian children reporting Pfcrt 76 and Pfmdr1 86 mutant frequencies (with numerators/denominators) at five named sentinel sites (Hohoe, Navrongo, Tarkwa, Sunyani, Yendi). Markers, extractable frequencies, sub-country resolution, and African field samples are all satisfied. However, no sample collection date or time window is stated anywhere in the paper, so temporal resolution cannot be established.
exclusion_reasons: No collection year or time window given for the samples, so temporal resolution <=3 years cannot be confirmed.
